_meta.title: College: First Week
_meta.notes: Seven-day arc. Three time slots per day. Six simultaneous streams. Something always slips.

canonical_npcs.npc_roommate_dana: Dana — your roommate. Organized, cautious, observing. Wants to know if you're trustworthy in a small shared space.
canonical_npcs.npc_floor_miguel: Miguel Reyes — room 214. From San Antonio. Warm, confident, not a performance. First on the floor to learn everyone's name.
canonical_npcs.npc_prof_marsh: Prof. Marsh — Intro to Sociology or English. Tired and precise and occasionally brilliant. Notices whether you show up.
canonical_npcs.npc_studious_priya: Priya — classmate. Already two chapters ahead. Doesn't make small talk easily but opens a door if you say something non-stupid.
canonical_npcs.npc_floor_cal: Cal — floormate. No governor on impulse. Knocks at 11pm. Someone's best memory of freshman year and someone's worst.
canonical_npcs.npc_ambiguous_jordan: Jordan — hard to read on purpose. Notices things. Won't say what they're thinking. Means something different in every playthrough.
canonical_npcs.npc_ra_scott: Scott — RA. Prepared, slightly weary, genuinely trying. Not a threat. A variable.
canonical_npcs.npc_parent_voice: Your parent — off-screen. Check-in calls. What you say shapes the self-concept you're building.

streams.money: not_yet_felt → tight | okay | comfortable → background_hum | friction_visible | active_stress
streams.opportunity: undiscovered → noticed | discovered → considering | deferred → pursuing | committed | expired

_seed_note: Week 1 content (13 storylets, Days 1–7) is seeded via supabase/migrations/20260316000002_seed_arc_one_week1.sql. The storylets array below is reserved for content that will be managed through the Content Studio and exported back here.
